SMA Negeri 1 Plus Matauli Pandan merupak: SMA Negeri 1 Plus Matauli Pandan is an excellent state school under the MATAULI Foundation and the Ministry of Education and Culture of North Sumatra Province. Founded on June 14, 1994, until 2025 this school has graduated 30 classes with more than 8,000 alumni.
SMA Negeri 1 Plus MATAULI Pandan adalah: SMA Negeri 1 Plus MATAULI Pandan is an excellent state school under the Maju Tapian Nauli Foundation (MATAULI) and the Ministry of Education and Culture in North Sumatra Province. On June 14, 1994, the first class was officially inaugurated by the Commander of the Armed Forces, General TNI Feisal Tanjung and Dr. Ir. H. Akbar Tandjung, along with national figures from Central Tapanuli.
Semangat Keakraban, Rasa Solidaritas Yan: Spirit of Togetherness, Strong Sense of Solidarity
Membangun komunitas sekolah yang hangat: Building a warm school community full of togetherness.
Standar pendidikan bertaraf internasiona: International standard education recognized in more than 150 countries.
Fasilitas asrama modern dengan lingkunga: Modern dormitory facilities with a conducive learning environment to support students' overall life and achievements.
Didukung guru-guru berpengalaman dan ber: Supported by experienced and internationally certified teachers.
Perjalanan panjang SMAN 1 Matauli Pandan: The long journey of SMAN 1 Matauli Pandan in producing superior and character-filled generations since 1994
1991 - Pendirian Yayasan Maju Tapian Nau: 1991 - Establishment of Maju Tapian Nauli Foundation (MATAULI)
Yayasan Maju Tapian Nauli (MATAULI) didi: The Maju Tapian Nauli Foundation (MATAULI) was established in 1991 by General TNI (Ret) Feisal Tanjung and Dr. Ir. H. Akbar Tandjung along with Central Tapanuli community figures who cared about education.
SMA Negeri 1 (Plus) Matauli Pandan didir: SMA Negeri 1 (Plus) Matauli Pandan was established in 1994 at Jl. K. H. Dewantara No. 01 Pandan, Central Tapanuli Regency, North Sumatra Province.
1994 - Kerjasama dengan Kanwil Depdikbud: 1994 - Cooperation with Regional Office of Ministry of Education and Culture North Sumatra Province
Kerjasama antara Kantor Wilayah Departem: Cooperation between the Regional Office of the Department of Education and Culture of North Sumatra Province and the MATAULI Foundation.
Pada 26 Oktober dilakukan perubahan stat: On October 26, the status was changed to SMAN State 2 MATAULI Sibolga.
Pada 27 Januari melakukan perubahan nama: On January 27, the name was changed to SMA Negeri 1 MATAULI PANDAN.
SMA Negeri 1 (Plus) Matauli Pandan menda: SMA Negeri 1 (Plus) Matauli Pandan obtained the Quality Management System (SMM) ISO 9001: 2008 certificate as a guide for implementing the school management system.
2012 - Menjadi Sekolah Penyedia Layanan: 2012 - Becoming an IT-Based Data Service Provider School
Sejak tahun 2012, SMA Negeri 1 (Plus) Ma: Since 2012, SMA Negeri 1 (Plus) Matauli Pandan has been trusted as an IT-based data service provider for all high schools in Central Tapanuli Regency.
2014 - Perpanjang Kerjasama dengan Dinas: 2014 - Extension of Cooperation with Department of Education
Pada 28 Februari melakukan Perpanjangan: On February 28, the Cooperation Extension of the North Sumatra Province Department of Education with the MATAULI Foundation was carried out.
Sekolah ini telah terakreditasi A dengan: This school has been accredited A with Accreditation SK Number 1347/BAN-SM/SK/2021 on December 8, 2021.
Penerapan Kurikulum Merdeka dan Internat: Implementation of Merdeka Curriculum and International Baccalaureate and digital transformation in all aspects of learning.
Mewujudkan SMA Negeri 1 Matauli Pandan s: Realizing SMA Negeri 1 Matauli Pandan as a place of excellent educational service that produces graduates with Pancasila character, global competitiveness and environmental awareness.
Mewujudkan pelayanan pendidikan yang ber: Realizing education services based on educational research and innovation as well as science and technology that exceeds national education standards (SNP)
Mewujudkan budaya sekolah yang disiplin,: Realizing a school culture that is disciplined, diligent, with integrity, firm, persevering, responsible and tolerant
Mewujudkan siswa yang memiliki keterampi: Realizing students who have critical thinking, communication, collaboration and creativity skills
SMAN 1 Matauli Pandan bernaung di bawah: SMAN 1 Matauli Pandan is under the Maju Tapian Nauli Foundation. With a modern learning environment, experienced teachers, and various extracurricular activities, SMAN 1 Matauli Pandan is committed to forming students who are faithful, knowledgeable, virtuous, and ready to compete at national and global levels.
